items.summary: Fix the backend admin authentication so that username and password credentials are sufficient to grant admin access. The backend `loginAdmin` (or equivalent) function must accept a username+password pair and return a valid admin session/role without requiring Internet Identity or any additional principal-based check. Admin role must persist for the duration of the session.

Update the frontend admin authentication flow so that after a successful username/password login, all subsequent backend calls to admin-restricted endpoints (upload artwork, edit content, upload images, save social/media contacts) are authorized correctly. Ensure the session token or credential established at login is passed along with every admin backend call.
